evidence_summary: Approved round-311: carried parser-parity fixtures now enter through sourceFile/sourceText and the shared parser-owned source-text lexer/parser front door before grammar parsing. Static audits found no fixture-authored ParserSourceInput/SourceSymbol streams, exact-source/static-token shortcuts, or public ParserSourceInput entrypoints. Focused source-text matcher, 17-example parser-parity group, six direct fixture smokes, git diff --check, cabal build all, cabal test, and thesis gate passed.

completion_pointers.text: round-311 completed item-311-parser-source-text-front-door: carried parser-parity fixtures now expose sourceFile/sourceText and call the shared parser-owned source-text lexer/parser front door before grammar parsing; evidence: focused source-text matcher, parser-parity group, static banned-shape audits, six direct smokes, full Cabal gate, and thesis gate passed.
